summary: Tested 'Save as PDF' button visibility for Diagnostic Reports in Client Dashboard. CODE REVIEW VERIFIED: Button is correctly implemented at line 663-669 with data-testid='download-diagnostic-pdf-btn'. Backend API confirmed - 1 diagnostic report exists (id: d4adca81-4809-4b5d-93cf-ee00998549dd) with status 'shared'. Browser automation crashes on ClientDashboard page (known environment resource constraint from iterations 38-39). UI verification not possible via Playwright due to browser crashes.

integration_issues.issue: Browser crashes when loading ClientDashboard page - consistent with previous iterations (38-39). Unable to visually verify PDF button.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - Environment resource constraint, not a code issue

action_items: Manual testing recommended to visually verify 'Save as PDF' button in client diagnostic report dialog
Consider reducing ClientDashboard.js component size/complexity if browser crashes persist
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: 'Save as PDF' button correctly implemented at lines 663-669 in DiagnosticReportDialog
VERIFIED: Button has violet background (bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700)
VERIFIED: Button text is 'Save as PDF' with Download icon
VERIFIED: handlePrintDiagnosticReport function (lines 248-334) properly generates PDF using jsPDF and html2canvas
VERIFIED: jsPDF (^4.0.0) and html2canvas (^1.4.1) are installed in package.json
VERIFIED: ReportsTab component (lines 1176-1247) displays diagnostic reports when diagnosticReports.length > 0
VERIFIED: Clicking report card calls onViewReport(report.id) which triggers handleViewDiagnosticReport
VERIFIED: handleViewDiagnosticReport (lines 238-246) fetches report and opens dialog
VERIFIED: Dialog shows report content and footer with 'Save as PDF' and 'Close' buttons

success_rate.frontend: CODE REVIEW PASSED - UI testing blocked by browser crashes

context_for_next_testing_agent: Browser automation consistently crashes on ClientDashboard page. Login works fine - redirects to /client. All code verification shows PDF button is correctly implemented. Recommend manual testing or trying with increased browser resources. API endpoints working correctly.

GET /api/auth/login.notes: Client login works - returns token and user data

GET /api/diagnostic-reports.notes: Returns 1 diagnostic report with id d4adca81-4809-4b5d-93cf-ee00998549dd, status 'shared'

Save as PDF Button (Code Review).notes: Button at line 663-669 with correct styling, data-testid, and onClick handler

DiagnosticReportDialog (Code Review).notes: Dialog at lines 631-682 shows report content and footer buttons correctly

handlePrintDiagnosticReport (Code Review.notes: Function at lines 248-334 generates PDF using jsPDF and html2canvas

ReportsTab Component (Code Review).notes: Lines 1176-1247 correctly render diagnostic reports and handle clicks
